title: pavonia ortegiana
intro: Pavonia ortegiana is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae) native to Central America. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia ortegiana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Pavonia ortegiana can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
